dispositions.rationale: False positive (model hallucination). `npm test` does NOT fail — it runs 23 tests, all passing (verified 2026-07-12). The claimed error 'cannot find module node' is fabricated, and package.json already declares engines.node '>=18.0.0'. The DeepSeek (deepseek-coder:1.3b) reviewer invented a non-existent test failure from a partial diff. Qwen (technical reviewer) independently found no blocking issues. Verified by the Execution Lead.
